li.label: bee lover
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} truly loves bees. {PAWN_pronoun} receives a significant mood boost if there are beehives or apiaries in the region.

li.label: bee hives
li.description: I love these little workaholics. Their honey is great too!

li.label: bee hater
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} truly hate bees. {PAWN_possessive} mood is greatly dampened when there are beehives or apiaries in the region.

li.label: bee hives
li.description: Those buzzy bugs might sting me. I hate the very idea of them being around!
